installCommand: if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix frontend install; elif [ -f ../frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix ../frontend install; else echo 'frontend not found' && exit 1; fi
buildCommand: if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix frontend run build; elif [ -f ../frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix ../frontend run build; else echo 'frontend not found' && exit 1; fi
devCommand: if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix frontend run dev; elif [ -f ../frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix ../frontend run dev; else echo 'frontend not found' && exit 1; fi
